message:
test(ftui-extras): improve logging.rs test coverage (bd-207vs)

Add 28 new tests covering:
- strip_debug_quotes edge cases (single char, no quotes, partial quotes)
- level_str exact return values
- level_style attribute verification (error bold, debug/trace dim)
- Config field independence
- Each log level output via SharedWriter (ERROR, WARN, DEBUG, TRACE)
- EventVisitor field type recording (bool, i64, u64)
- Multiple field separation
- Event with no message (only fields)
- Fields hidden when show_fields=false
- show_source/show_time/show_target output verification
- Empty message events
- into_console extraction

Total logging::tests: 19 → 47. All gates green (clippy, fmt, tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
